description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage that runs three jobs (job-ghc710, job-ghc800, job-ghc802) each using a specific Docker image from registry.gitlab.com/dxld/ghc-mod for GHC 7.10.3, 8.0.2, and 8.2.2 respectively. In each job, the before_script creates a cabal store symlink, updates cabal, installs cabal-doctest, runs cabal act-as-setup to produce source distributions in a pipeline‑specific directory, and then the script echoes the working directory, prints the cabal path and version, configures with tests enabled, builds, tests, and generates Haddock documentation using cabal new-configure, cabal new-build, cabal new-test, and cabal new-haddock. After each job, the after_script removes the temporary source‑distribution directory. All jobs always collect the ~/.cabal/logs directory as an artifact. No additional caches, services, or conditional rules are defined.
